attributes.description: Overview of authentication logs in OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise.

params.markdown:
#### OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise

**Authentication Logs**

This dashboard gives visibility into the authentication activity of OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise, showing user logins, token issuance, and logouts across the workspace or organization. It highlights total events and unique users, trends of authentication actions over time, the share of each action and outcome, and the source geography and clients involved. Use the controls above to filter by action, user, and source country to support security oversight, auditing, and anomaly detection.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/openai_chatgpt_enterprise/overview)**
